title: Liquor scam: Chhattisgarh High Court grants bail to Anwar Dhebar in corruption case
description: The Chhattisgarh High Court on Tuesday granted bail to Raipur-based businessman Anwar Dhebar in a corruption case registered in connection with the alleged multi-crore Chhattisgarh liquor scam.Justice Arvind Kumar Verma observed that Dhebar had been in jail for nearly 22 months and that his continued incarceration without the commencement of trial would violate his right to personal liberty. "This Court deems it proper to grant bail to the Applicant (Anwar Dhebar), notwithstanding the undiminish
